race.comment: MAJESTIC LEGEND (6) has closed strongly in two runs back and ready to get off the mark at start nine. Sat mid field and warmed up late with a sound third over 1000m at Hawkesbury. Can get cover from the gate and expected to go close. CAPDIVA (4) showed a stack of ability in her first prep and shouldn't be a Maiden for long. Has plenty of early speed and leading apprentice retains the ride. Recent trial winner over 790m and has solid top-three prospects. RISING REVOLUTION (7) deep into the prep and will appreciate the firmer surface. Three weeks between runs when she folded up late to finish fourth in a small field over 1100m at Gosford. Expected to be around the money. ZINGER (12) is a Churchill filly out of Zonk on debut for the Matt Smith yard. Has a stack of gear going on for this and the two trials had merit. Leading contender. The chances don't end there.
